data.title: Conor McGregor Slams Khabib’s NFT Drop but Gets Shut Down by ZachXBT — Here Is Why the Drama Exploded
data.description:
"Conor McGregor, the former UFC champion known for his bold personality and sharp tongue, has publicly criticized Khabib Nurmagomedov's recent foray into the world of non-fungible tokens (NFTs), describing the NFT drop as unworthy of attention. However, his comments quickly drew a response from well-known blockchain investigator ZachXBT, who effectively countered McGregor's criticisms and provided insights that shed light on the underlying issues. As a result, the interactions have spiraled into a heated drama filled with sharp exchanges and contrasting opinions, raising questions about the motivations behind both fighters' moves in the rapidly evolving digital asset space. Here is a detailed explanation of why this unexpected confrontation has gained so much traction and turned into a sensational topic of discussion within the MMA community and beyond."
source: https://blocknews.com/conor-mcgregor-slams-khabibs-nft-drop-but-gets-shut-down-by-zachxbt-here-is-why-the-drama-exploded/

data.title: Analyst Says Altcoin Bear Market Is Ending, Not the Bull Market: New Cycle Chart Signals “One-Time” Opportunity
data.description:
Crypto analyst Michaël van de Poppe believes the market is misreading the current cycle. According to him, the bull market is not ending, instead, the altcoin bear market is. His comments follow a widely shared chart from analyst TechDev, which visually maps Bitcoin’s long-term business cycle against altcoin macro lows
source: https://www.ethnews.com/analyst-says-altcoin-bear-market-is-ending-not-the-bull-market-new-cycle-chart-signals-one-time-opportunity/

data.title: Tether CEO Responds to S&P Rating Criticism
data.description:
According to PANews, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino has addressed the recent rating given by S&P Global on the X platform, expressing pride in the assessment. Ardoino criticized traditional financial institutions' rating models, which have historically led individuals and organizations to invest in companies that eventually failed despite having investment-grade ratings. This has prompted global regulators to question the models and the supposed independence and objectivity of major rating agencies.

Ardoino stated that when companies attempt to challenge the 'gravity' of the broken financial system, traditional finance's promotional machinery becomes anxious, suggesting that no company should dare to detach from it. He emphasized that Tether has established itself as the first company in the financial industry with excessive capital and without holding any toxic reserve assets, maintaining high profitability.

This statement follows S&P Global's decision to downgrade USDT's stability rating to the lowest level, citing exposure risks related to Bitcoin.

data.title: Alien BTC findings: If humans vanished, Bitcoin’s block time and difficulty would preserve our collapse
data.description:
This is a speculative report translated for non-specialists. The narrator is an investigator who arrived long after humans were gone. Everything described as measured relies on real Bitcoin mechanics: block intervals, difficulty/target, timestamp rules, and data available from block headers and the coinbase transaction. We arrived on a silent planet
source: https://cryptoslate.com/alien-btc-findings-if-humans-vanished-bitcoins-block-time-and-difficulty-would-preserve-our-collapse/

data.title: UAE Brings DeFi, Web3, Stablecoins, and DEXs Under Central Bank Oversight
data.description:
The United Arab Emirates has taken one of its most sweeping regulatory steps to date with the enactment of Federal Decree No. 6 of 2025, a banking law that places DeFi, Web3 platforms, stablecoin protocols, decentralized exchanges, and cross-chain bridges directly under the supervision of the Central Bank of the UAE (CBUAE).
source: https://www.ethnews.com/uae-brings-defi-web3-stablecoins-and-dexs-under-central-bank-oversight/

data.title: BlackRock quietly boosts its Bitcoin bet by 14%
data.description:
BlackRock is quietly deepening its Bitcoin bet while other investors await stable market conditions. A new quarterly filing reveals that the firm’s Strategic Income Opportunities Portfolio pushed its holdings of the iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) by 14%. It now holds 2. 39 million shares worth roughly $156 million. This surge came in between June and September. […]

data.title: JPMorgan Revises Forecast: Fed Expected to Cut Rates in December
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, JPMorgan economists have revised their forecast, now predicting that the Federal Reserve will initiate interest rate cuts in December. This marks a reversal from the bank's previous assessment a week ago, which anticipated that policymakers would delay rate cuts until January of next year. The research team noted that statements from several influential Federal Reserve officials supporting a near-term rate cut prompted them to reassess the situation. Currently, JPMorgan expects the Federal Reserve to implement two 25 basis point rate cuts in December and January.

data.title: Xapo Bank Expands BTC Credit Fund to All Eligible Members After $100M Pilot
data.description:
Xapo Bank is widening access to its Xapo BTC Credit Fund, opening the product to all eligible members after a successful early-access phase that attracted $100 million in member allocations. The expansion marks a major step in the bank’s push to build a full suite of regulated wealth-management tools designed specifically for long-term Bitcoin holders.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xapo-bank-expands-btc-credit-fund-to-all-eligible-members-after-100m-pilot/
